name: Playwright - FULL SUITE PREMIUM V4 (Enhanced Errors)

parameters.name: text
parameters.value:
={{ '📊 *' + $json.product + ' Suite Final Summary*

🏁 *Total Files:* ' + $json.totalScripts + '
✅ *Passed:* ' + $json.passedCases + '
❌ *Failed:* ' + $json.failedCases + '
📈 *Success Rate:* ' + $json.successRate + '%

*Detailed Status:*
' + $json.chatDetails }}

parameters.jsCode:
const data = $input.item.json; const tableRows = data.allTestCases.map(tc => { const status = (tc.status || '').toLowerCase(); const isPassed = status === 'passed'; const label = isPassed ? 'PASSED' : 'FAILED'; const color = isPassed ? '#27ae60' : '#e74c3c'; return `${tc.title}${tc.file || tc.filename || 'N/A'}${label}`; }).join(''); const html = `

🚀 ${data.product} Automation Summary

Enhanced Error Tracking Suite

Files
${data.totalScripts}
Passed
${data.passedCases}
Failed
${data.failedCases}
Success
${data.successRate}%

Detailed Report

${tableRows}
Test Title Source File Status
Generated by QAutoX Automation Engine on ${data.timestamp}
`; return { json: { ...data, summaryHtml: html } };
